economic_notes: O'Chiese has 16 government business enterprises including energy, safety services, contracting, well services, gaming, marketplace, utilities, land development, communications, hospitality, and cascade power. GBEs had combined revenue of $48,609,397 and net income of $5,385,666 in 2022. Nation received $26M in new FNFA financing during the year for business investments. Settlement Trust excluded from consolidated statements per Note 17.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022. Long-term debt includes both long-term debt ($16,603,189) and promissory note payable to FNFA ($43,870,011) totaling $60,473,200. Federal trust funds of $50,074,435 held by Government of Canada (Ottawa Trust) are included as financial assets. 16 GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis including Jackpot Casino, O'Chiese Gaming, O'Chiese Energy, and others. Settlement Trust (from 2007 Canada settlement) is excluded from consolidated statements. Nation received $6,472,534 in COVID-19 additional funding from ISC included in ISC funding. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($16,546,075) + CMHC ($252,147) + HRD ($449,887) + FNDF ($332,396) + Alberta FNDF restricted cash = $17,580,505 approximately; used ISC + CMHC + HRD + FNDF = $17,580,505 but FNDF is provincial so total_government_transfers = 17580505. OSR = royalties + interest Ottawa Trust + equity income + other income = 55,726,466. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements.
